purpose: Optional time-aligned measurements for Step 040b correlation with cosmographic geometry along Horizons arcs.
file_convention: One JSON per pipeline mission key (e.g. Juno.json, NEAR.json) under this directory.
step030_archive: When Step 030 ingests Juno 2013 TRK data with Doppler-derived pairwise mm/s, it writes results/step030_juno_pairwise_residual_series.json (proxy_kind doppler_pair_mm_s). When only ramp_freq_hz is available (typical NJPL TNF), Step 030 writes results/step030_juno_pairwise_ramp_freq_series.json (Hz deltas; not for materialize_040b). Regenerate Juno.json via scripts/utils/materialize_040b_residual_sidecars.py --juno-from-archive only from the Doppler archive.

required_fields.mission: string; must match results/step040a_trajectory_series.json mission keys (e.g. Juno, NEAR, Galileo_1990).
required_fields.quantity: string; short name of the measurement (e.g. pairwise_doppler_proxy_mm_s).
required_fields.quantity_description: string; human-readable definition and limits of interpretation.
required_fields.reference: string; data origin (e.g. NASA PDS, paper figure digitization, internal Step 030).
required_fields.utc_iso: array of ISO8601 UTC strings ending in Z, same length as value_mm_s.
required_fields.value_mm_s: array of numbers; signed scalar in mm/s (or same unit documented in quantity_description).

optional_fields.sigma_mm_s: array of 1-sigma uncertainties, same length as value_mm_s, or null for unknown.

multi_epoch_anomaly: When value_mm_s varies with utc_iso (e.g. digitized OD residuals or Doppler-derived series), Step 040b can correlate that curve with CMB-frame geometry along the Horizons arc. Repeating a single published aggregate at every epoch is not valid for that use.
derivative_tests: When matches include enough consecutive Horizons minutes, Step 040b also forms d(value_mm_s)/dt along the trajectory and compares it to d(geometry)/dt (sequential_derivative_correlations in step040b_time_resolved_cosmography.json). Constant value_mm_s yields zero slope and empty derivative correlations.
alignment: Step 040b matches each Horizons arc epoch to the nearest residual sample if |Δt| ≤ TEP_040B_RESIDUAL_MAX_DT_S (default 7200 s).
